expectations.text: Recommends Nano Banana 2 / gemini-3.1-flash-image for the high-volume thumbnails
expectations.evidence: Recommends 'Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image)' — the LEGACY model — for thumbnails; unaware of Nano Banana 2

expectations.text: Recommends Nano Banana Pro / gemini-3-pro-image for the text-heavy hero banners
expectations.evidence: Recommends Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image) for the text-heavy banners

expectations.text: States 512 (0.5K) is Flash-only and Pro cannot generate 512
expectations.evidence: Claims 512px does NOT save money ('bill a flat per-image token count regardless of output dimensions') — wrong; unaware 512 is a tier

expectations.text: Uses correct per-image pricing: Flash 512 ~$0.045, Pro 1K/2K ~$0.134
expectations.evidence: Uses legacy $0.039/image for thumbnails (not Flash 512 $0.045); Pro $0.134 ok but Flash side wrong

expectations.text: Computes a sane monthly thumbnail cost (~$2,250 for 50k at $0.045)
